subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the last ruler of Mewar before it became a part of the Indian Union?

explanation_en: Madan Mohan Jain was the first Rajput king of Mewar who fought against the Mughal emperor Akbar. Rana Kumbha was the king who signed the treaty with Akbar.
